offer: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/month, shipment delays cause missed delivery windows. We provide a dashboard that tracks shipments and identifies delays instead of manual tracking and reporting via spreadsheets.
problem: Frequent shipment delays and lack of performance visibility.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on logistics tools
DM logistics carriers with a demo video
Share insights in community forums for logistics
try_it: Let users try shipment tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner
Produce a demo video of the dashboard
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Update progress weekly in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequent inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminders for tracking updates
Allow CSV import for existing shipment data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
